main.description: Register an activity on a report. For status_change actions, validates the transition and optionally updates report.status atomically.

reportId.description: ID of the report to record activity on

toState.description: Target status. Required when action is status_change.

note.description: Optional free-text note. Can accompany any action type.

updateStatus.description: When action is status_change, also update report.status to toState. Defaults to true.

errors.name: ReportNotFound
errors.description: No report exists with the given reportId

errors.name: MissingTargetState
errors.description: toState is required when action is status_change

errors.name: InvalidStateTransition
errors.description: The requested state transition is not permitted from the report's current status

errors.name: AlreadyInTargetState
errors.description: The report is already in the requested status
